headlines.title: Trump-backed Rep. Julia Letlow wins Louisiana Senate primary runoff
headlines.description: Rep. Julia Letlow won the Republican primary runoff for Senate in Louisiana, NBC News projects, defeating state Treasurer John Fleming in another victory for President Donald Trump’s slate of preferred candidates

headlines.title: Trump’s endorsement faces another test in Louisiana Senate primary runoff
headlines.description: Polls have closed in Louisiana, where President Donald Trump’s endorsement is once again be on the ballot Saturday in the GOP primary runoff for Senate in Louisiana

headlines.title: Trump says he is nominating former Oklahoma state trooper Lance Schroyer to be ICE director
headlines.description: President Donald Trump announced Saturday that he nominated Lance Schroyer, a former Oklahoma state trooper, to take over as director of Immigration and Customs Enforcement.“I am very pleased to announce that I have nominated Lance Schroyer to be our next ICE Director,” Trump wrote in a Truth Social post.

headlines.title: Trump Faces Iran Escalation and Affordability Crisis in US
headlines.description: Filling in for Kristen Welker as Moderator of Meet the Press, NBC’s Ryan Nobles joins Joe Fryer on Sunday TODAY to discuss the big challenges President Donald Trump is facing both at home and abroad with tensions in Iran once again on the rise and battles within his own party.

headlines.title: Trump Warns ‘Islamic Republic May No Longer Exist’ Amid Strikes
headlines.description: Ten days after the signing of the Trump administration’s memorandum of understanding with Iran, the two sides are battling again for control of the Strait of Hormuz and accusing each other of violating their agreements. On social media, President Donald Trump said, “There may come a point when we are no longer able to be reasonable and will be forced to militarily complete the job that we very successfully started. If that happens, the Islamic Republic will no longer exist.” NBC’s Keir S

headlines.title: Rep. Julia Letlow wins Louisiana Senate primary runoff
headlines.description: Rep. Julia Letlow celebrated her Republican primary runoff win for Senate in Louisiana, defeating John Fleming in another victory. WDSU reports.

headlines.title: Civil rights, moon landings and war wins: What Americans see as the country’s greatest achievements
headlines.description: The NBC News poll asked American adults which historical event they thought was the country’s biggest accomplishment in its 250 years.

headlines.title: State Assemblyman Alex Bores speaks on AI and politics
headlines.description: State Assemblyman Alex Bores, a candidate for New York's 12th Congressional District, speaks with NBC News’ Gadi Schwartz about why some top artificial intelligence companies are opposing his candidacy and whether AI should play a role in politics.

headlines.title: U.S. government gives Anthropic green light for limited re-release of Mythos 5
headlines.description: The U.S. government is allowing Anthropic to deploy its Mythos 5 model to a select group of customers and partners, according to a letter from Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick to Anthropic that was seen by NBC News

headlines.title: Ex-Trump adviser John Bolton pleads guilty to mishandling classified information
headlines.description: The former national security adviser pleaded guilty in federal court to mishandling classified information related to his work during Trump’s first term.

headlines.title: Pete Buttigieg targeted by ‘false report’ to authorities involving his 4-year-old twins
headlines.description: The former transportation secretary said he was forced to spend 24 hours away from his 4-year-old twins during the probe. Police determined it was a false report.

headlines.title: What if the economy gets better and it doesn’t help the GOP?: From the Politics Desk
headlines.description: In today’s edition, Jonathan Allen goes back to the ‘90s to explain the economic challenge Republicans face in this fall’s midterms.
